title: Gingidium monroi

This family consists of about 13,000 species of plants, including coffee, gardenias, and some species of orchids. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. intro: Gingidium monroi is a plant species native to tropical regions, commonly known as a type of vine.
